name: PLM Equipment Growth Fund III
summary: PLM Equipment Growth Fund III Liquidating Trust was formed for liquidate all of the remaining assets and pay all remaining liabilities of PLM Equipment Growth Fund III. PLM Financial Services, Inc. operates as the trustee of the Liquidating Trust. PLM Equipment Growth Fund III Liquidating Trust would be terminated, effective June 30, 2004. The Liquidating Trust was founded in 2002 and has its principal executive offices in St. Petersburg, Florida.
